activities_projects.title: Diary Entry Drawing
activities_projects.objective: Visualize Anne Frank’s hiding place and daily life.
steps: Draw the secret annex where Anne and her family lived
Include items she mentioned in the diary
Label key areas and objects
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will understand Anne Frank’s living conditions and daily life.

activities_projects.title: Character Traits List
steps: List five qualities of Anne Frank (e.g., optimistic, observant)
Give one example from the diary for each trait
Share with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will describe character traits with textual support.

activities_projects.title: Timeline of Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the sequence of events in Anne Frank’s diary.
steps: Draw a simple timeline of events from the diary
Include major events like moving into the annex and hiding
Add brief descriptions for each event
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will learn to organize events chronologically.

activities_projects.title: New Vocabulary List
steps: Identify 10 new words from the diary
Write their meanings
Use each word in a simple sentence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will improve vocabulary and sentence construction skills.

activities_projects.title: Feelings Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand emotions expressed in the diary.
steps: Identify at least 5 emotions Anne felt (e.g., fear, hope, loneliness)
Write the diary entry date for each emotion
Share findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will recognize and relate to the emotional depth in the diary.

activities_projects.title: Short Speech – My Day in Hiding
steps: Imagine being in hiding like Anne
Prepare a 1-minute speech about your day
Present in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will express empathy and practice speaking skills.

activities_projects.title: Secret Annex Model
steps: Make a simple model of the secret annex
Include furniture and rooms described in the diary
Present to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will understand spatial arrangement and living conditions.

activities_projects.title: Moral of the Diary Poster
activities_projects.objective: Identify and present the main message of the diary.
steps: Write the central message of the diary (hope, courage, resilience)
Add illustrations or symbols
Present to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will grasp the diary’s moral and express it visually.

activities_projects.title: Character Emotion Role Play
activities_projects.objective: Experience feelings of characters through enactment.
steps: Assign roles (Anne, her family members)
Act out a scene from the diary
Express emotions clearly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will develop empathy and expressive skills.

activities_projects.title: Quote Illustration Activity
steps: Choose one inspiring quote from the diary
Illustrate it visually
Explain the meaning in one sentence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will interpret text and express understanding creatively.
activities_projects.evaluation: Relevance of illustration and clarity of explanation
